title: Create a Calling Campaign
lede: Build an automated outbound calling campaign: create it, attach an AI agent and phone numbers, load the contacts to call, set your dialing pace, and start it.

steps.title: Create a new campaign
steps.content:
1. In the left menu open Campaigns to see your campaign list.
  2. Click Create New Campaign in the top right.
  3. A new draft campaign is created and opens automatically. It starts in Draft status, so nothing is dialed yet.

images.caption: The Campaigns list with the Create New Campaign button
The Campaigns list with the Create New Campaign button

steps.title: Name it and attach an AI agent + phone numbers
steps.content:
Open the Settings tab inside the campaign and fill in:

  • Name and Description so you can find it later.
  • Phone Numbers — pick one or more of your numbers to dial out from. You can select whole groups at once.
  • AI Agents — choose the AI agent that will handle each answered call. Don't have one yet? Create it first under Intelligence Center → Smart Agents.

Changes on this tab save automatically.

images.caption: The campaign Settings tab where you pick the AI agent and phone numbers
The campaign Settings tab where you pick the AI agent and phone numbers

steps.title: Add people to call (the dial list)
steps.content:
1. Open the Add Leads or Add Contacts tab.
  2. Search your CRM and add the people you want to call — they get queued into this campaign's dial list.
  3. Switch to the Dial List tab to review everyone queued and their attempt status.

images.caption: Add Leads / Add Contacts pull people from your CRM into the dial list
Add Leads / Add Contacts pull people from your CRM into the dial list

steps.title: Set the dialing pace and hours
steps.content:
Still on the Settings tab, control how fast the campaign dials:

  • Max Concurrent Calls — how many calls run at the same time.
  • Working hours and working days — the campaign only dials inside this window.
  • Time zone — keep the default to respect each contact's local time, or pin one zone.
  • Optionally enable Inbound Callbacks so people who call your number back are routed to an AI agent or a team group.

steps.title: Start the campaign
steps.content:
1. Go back to the Campaigns list (or use the campaign's own controls).
  2. Click the Start (play) icon on the campaign row.
  3. The status changes to Running and calls begin within your working hours. Use the Pause icon any time to stop dialing.

When every contact has been fully attempted, the campaign automatically moves to Completed and its dial list is archived.
